result.markdown:
--- title: "glmmTMB Volcano Plots" format: html --- Volcano plots for the trisomy effect (Trisomic A vs Disomic B) in each plaque background (NLGF, hAPP), derived from the glmmTMB model fitted in `scripts/glmmTMB.qmd`. Points are coloured by direction and significance; top 20 up- and down-regulated genes are labelled. **Inputs:** `output/run1/objects/glmmTMB_with_interactions_corrected.qs2` ## Load libraries ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} library(qs2) library(Seurat) library(dplyr) library(ggplot2) library(ggrepel) ``` ::: ## Load data ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} run_num <- "run1" objects_dir <- file.path("output", run_num, "objects") required_input <- file.path(objects_dir, "glmmTMB_with_interactions_corrected.qs2") if (!file.exists(required_input)) { message("Required input not found: ", required_input, "\nRun scripts/glmmTMB.qmd first.") knitr::knit_exit() } final_df <- qs_read(required_input) seurat_input <- file.path(objects_dir, "prelabelled_integrated_rpca.qs2") if (!file.exists(seurat_input)) { message("Required input not found: ", seurat_input, "\nRun seurat_trisomy_v1/v2.qmd first.") knitr::knit_exit() } seurat_obj <- qs_read(seurat_input) # avg_log_expr: per-gene mean of the SCT "data" layer (sctransform log-normalised # counts) across all cells in prelabelled_integrated_rpca.qs2. # Used as the A-axis (average expression) in MA plots below. avg_expr <- rowMeans(GetAssayData(seurat_obj, assay = "SCT", layer = "data")) final_df <- left_join( final_df, data.frame(Gene = names(avg_expr), avg_log_expr = as.numeric(avg_expr)), by = "Gene" ) ``` ::: ## Volcano plots — Trisomy effect (A vs B) ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} volcano_cols <- c( "Upregulated" = "#e41a1c", "Downregulated" = "#377eb8", "Not Significant" = "grey80" ) generate_volcano <- function(df, bg_label) { dat <- df %>% filter(contrast == "A - B", Background == bg_label) %>% mutate( Status = case_when( FDR < 0.05 & estimate > 0.5 ~ "Upregulated", FDR < 0.05 & estimate < -0.5 ~ "Downregulated", TRUE ~ "Not Significant" ) ) %>% group_by(Status) %>% mutate(GroupRank = rank(FDR)) %>% ungroup() %>% mutate( Label = case_when( Status != "Not Significant" & GroupRank <= 20 ~ Gene, TRUE ~ NA_character_ ) ) n_up <- sum(dat$Status == "Upregulated") n_down <- sum(dat$Status == "Downregulated") ggplot(dat, aes(x = estimate, y = -log10(FDR), fill = Status, color = Status)) + geom_point(aes(size = Status, alpha = Status), shape = 21, stroke = 0.2) + scale_fill_manual(values = volcano_cols) + scale_color_manual(values = c( "Upregulated" = "black", "Downregulated" = "black", "Not Significant" = "grey90" )) + scale_size_manual(values = c( "Upregulated" = 3, "Downregulated" = 3, "Not Significant" = 1.5 )) + scale_alpha_manual(values = c( "Upregulated" = 1, "Downregulated" = 1, "Not Significant" = 0.3 )) + geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed", color = "grey30", linewidth = 0.8) + geom_vline(xintercept = c(-0.5, 0.5), linetype = "dashed", color = "grey30", linewidth = 0.8) + geom_label_repel( aes(label = Label), fill = "white", color = "black", fontface = "bold", size = 3.5, box.padding = 0.5, point.padding = 0.5, min.segment.length = 0, segment.color = "grey50", max.overlaps = 50 ) + labs( title = paste0("Trisomy effect (A vs B) — ", bg_label, " background"), subtitle = paste0( "Top 20 genes labelled | FDR < 0.05 | |estimate| > 0.5", " | Up: ", n_up, " Down: ", n_down ), x = "Estimate (log FC, glmmTMB)", y = bquote(bold("-Log"[10] ~ "FDR")) ) + theme_minimal(base_size = 14) + theme( plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 18, hjust = 0), plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12, color = "grey40", margin = margin(b = 10)), axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14), axis.text = element_text(face = "bold", color = "black"), axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1), axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1), legend.position = "top", legend.title = element_blank(), legend.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"), panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey95") ) } ``` ::: ### NLGF background ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} generate_volcano(final_df, "NLGF") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` Warning: Removed 47 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range (`geom_point()`). ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` Warning: Removed 14612 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range (`geom_label_repel()`). ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](glmmTMB_volcanos_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-4-1.png){width=960} ::: ::: ### hAPP background ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} generate_volcano(final_df, "hAPP") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` Warning: Removed 46 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range (`geom_point()`). ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` Warning: Removed 14612 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range (`geom_label_repel()`). ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](glmmTMB_volcanos_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-5-1.png){width=960} ::: ::: ## MA plots — Trisomy effect (A vs B) The x-axis (`avg_log_expr`) is the per-gene mean of the SCT log-normalised expression layer (`GetAssayData(assay = "SCT", layer = "data")`) across all cells in `prelabelled_integrated_rpca.qs2`. Top 20 significant genes per direction are labelled, ranked by average expression (highest first). ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} generate_ma_plot <- function(df, bg_label) { dat <- df %>% filter(contrast == "A - B", Background == bg_label) %>% mutate( Status = case_when( FDR < 0.05 & estimate > 0.5 ~ "Upregulated", FDR < 0.05 & estimate < -0.5 ~ "Downregulated", TRUE ~ "Not Significant" ) ) %>% group_by(Status) %>% mutate(GroupRank = rank(-avg_log_expr)) %>% ungroup() %>% mutate( Label = case_when( Status != "Not Significant" & GroupRank <= 20 ~ Gene, TRUE ~ NA_character_ ) ) ggplot(dat, aes(x = avg_log_expr, y = estimate, fill = Status, color = Status)) + geom_point(aes(size = Status, alpha = Status), shape = 21, stroke = 0.2) + scale_fill_manual(values = c( "Upregulated" = "#e41a1c", "Downregulated" = "#377eb8", "Not Significant" = "grey80" )) + scale_color_manual(values = c( "Upregulated" = "black", "Downregulated" = "black", "Not Significant" = "grey90" )) + scale_size_manual(values = c( "Upregulated" = 3, "Downregulated" = 3, "Not Significant" = 1.5 )) + scale_alpha_manual(values = c( "Upregulated" = 1, "Downregulated" = 1, "Not Significant" = 0.3 )) + geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) + geom_hline(yintercept = c(-0.5, 0.5), linetype = "dashed", color = "grey30") + geom_label_repel( aes(label = Label), fill = "white", color = "black", fontface = "bold", size = 3.5, min.segment.length = 0, max.overlaps = 50 ) + labs( title = paste0("MA Plot: Trisomy effect (A vs B) — ", bg_label, " background"), subtitle = "Top 20 genes labelled per direction | FDR < 0.05 | |estimate| > 0.5\nx-axis: mean SCT log-normalised expression across all cells", x = "Mean SCT log-normalised expression (avg_log_expr)", y = "Estimate (log FC, glmmTMB)" ) + theme_minimal(base_size = 14) + theme( plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 18, hjust = 0), plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12, color = "grey40", margin = margin(b = 10)), axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14), axis.text = element_text(face = "bold", color = "black"), axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1), axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1), legend.position = "top", legend.title = element_blank(), legend.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"), panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey95") ) } ``` ::: ### NLGF background ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} generate_ma_plot(final_df, "NLGF") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` Warning: Removed 14612 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range (`geom_label_repel()`). ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](glmmTMB_volcanos_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-7-1.png){width=960} ::: ::: ### hAPP background ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} generate_ma_plot(final_df, "hAPP") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` Warning: Removed 14612 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range (`geom_label_repel()`). ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](glmmTMB_volcanos_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-8-1.png){width=960} ::: ::: ## Top significant genes ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} final_df %>% filter(contrast == "A - B", !is.na(Background), FDR < 0.05) %>% arrange(Background, FDR) %>% group_by(Background) %>% slice_head(n = 20) %>% select(Background, Gene, estimate, FDR, Interaction_FDR) %>% ungroup() ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
````` ::: :::
